word: H739 - אֲרִיאֵל - ʼărîyʼêl - ar-ee-ale' - Lionlike men

sections.paragraph:
Original: אראל אריאל

Transliteration: 'ărı̂y'êl 'ări'êl

Phonetic: ar-ee-ale'

BDB Definition:

  1. meaning uncertain
    1. (CLBL) possibly lion-like
    2. (BDB) possibly two sons of Ariel of Moab

Origin: from H738 and H410

TWOT entry: 159a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
